summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No GitHub mutations, merges, or fix PRs are planned. Security-sensitive PRs are scoped to route_security; already-closed PR #76134 is kept closed; the remaining open PRs are preserved for normal maintainer review rather than closed from this mixed inventory shard.
